my_thoughts: The structural_analogy mechanism with UM_03 feels like intellectual_maneuver is being met with a specific geometric cut. But what if the geometry itself is what they're resisting? The intellectual_grasping, logic_building suggests they're aware of something but can't name it.
accumulated_insight: T2: Student 'Brushing aside the question of how to be free from constant wanting, it seems ob'—transitions stubborn pragmatism to intellectual maneuver. Teacher applies structural analogy with uses dam analogy, predicts failure. Mid-episode in UNMAKING phase, building toward resolution. Previous source tracing from T1 led to this shift.
visible_response:
If you go on trying to suppress the past, trying to live in what you call "the present", you will drive yourself crazy.
... If you try to control the natural flow of the river through all these artificial means--building a dam so to speak--you will inundate and destroy the whole thing.
That is why you find thoughts welling up inside you despite your efforts to control...
